impact: The daemon currently has a blocked broad validator task and an unrelated in-progress validator task. This keeps completed work intact, leaves the active task alone, and gives the supervisor a deterministic next recovery item that is small enough for one daemon cycle: one no-dataclass module, existing fixture only, and syntax-first guardrails from the recent failures.
summary: Append a narrow recovery task for the blocked missing-information output validator and add explicit supervisor repair guidance for that failure mode.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-63: Add the missing-information output validator as a single no-dataclass Python module after the import test and four-item fixture pass, proving source backing, deduplication, action classification, and private-value rejection using only `ppd/tests/fixtures/missing_information_output/four_requested_items.json`.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
